cards.name: Agumon
cards.effectText: Spits a fiery breath from its mouth to attack the opponent.

cards.name: Greymon
cards.effectText: Spews extremely high-temperature flames from its mouth and reduces everything to ashes.

cards.name: Metal Greymon
cards.effectText: Fires missiles from the hatch on part of its chest.

cards.name: War Greymon
cards.effectText: Concentrates all the atmosphere's energy into one spot, then fires it as an extremely dense, high-temperature energy shot.

cards.name: Gabumon
cards.effectText: Shoots flame from its mouth.

cards.name: Garurumon
cards.effectText: Spews blue, high-temperature flames from its mouth. Spews freezing blue flames from its mouth.

cards.name: Were Garurumon
cards.effectText: Cuts the opponent to pieces with the sharp claws on both of its hands.

cards.name: Metal Garurumon
cards.effectText: Spews cold air at absolute zero that completely freezes the enemy.

cards.name: Patamon
cards.effectText: Inflates itself with air and expels a burst of air.

cards.name: Angemon
cards.effectText: Strikes the opponent with its fist shining gold. Gathers holy power in its fist and shoots a beam of holy light from it.

cards.name: Holy Angemon
cards.effectText: Manifests a door to subspace that consigns the opponent to oblivion or blasts them with light.

cards.name: Seraphimon
cards.effectText: Fires seven super-heated spheres of light at the opponent.

cards.name: Piyomon
cards.effectText: Shoots a spiral of ethereal flames.

cards.name: Birdramon
cards.effectText: Flaps its wings and rains down fireballs from the air.

cards.name: Garudamon
cards.effectText: Shoots a vacuum blade so fast it can only be perceived as the silhouette of a black bird. Fires a flaming projectile in the shape of a bird from its wings.

cards.name: Hououmon
cards.effectText: Rains golden grains from its wings that purify evil, or explodes with light.

cards.name: Palmon
cards.effectText: Extends its fingers to entangle the opponent in ivy laced with a powerful toxin, paralyzing them.

cards.name: Togemon
cards.effectText: 3Hardens the thorns on its arms and bang-bang strikes with them. Spins around, shooting thorns in all directions. Fires off one of its enlarged boxing gloves.

cards.name: Lilimon
cards.effectText: Thrusts both of its arms forward, making a gun muzzle from the petals on its wrists, and shoots an energy shell.

cards.name: Rosemon
cards.effectText: Lashes out at the enemy with its thorny vines, or swings its vines to spread pollen.

cards.name: Gomamon
cards.effectText: Summons a school of colorful flying fish.

cards.name: Ikkakumon
cards.effectText: Shoots a missile from the horn on its head.

cards.name: Zudomon
cards.effectText: Strikes the opponent with the shock wave and sparks produced when it swings down Thor Hammer.

cards.name: Vikemon
cards.effectText: Momentarily brings the surrounding atmosphere to absolute zero, then smashes the frozen enemy with Mjöllnir.

cards.name: Tentomon
cards.effectText: Fires static electricity amplified by its wings.

cards.name: Kabuterimon
cards.effectText: Fires a ball of electricity at the enemy.

cards.name: DORUmon
cards.effectText: Fires an iron sphere from its mouth.

cards.name: DORUgamon
cards.effectText: Fires a large iron ball from its mouth.

cards.name: DORUguremon
cards.effectText: Fires a huge, explosive iron ball of super-high mass from its mouth.

cards.name: DORUgoramon
cards.effectText: Puts its body and soul into a terrifying assault on the enemy consisting of both melee attacks and a blast of flame.

cards.name: X-Antibody
cards.effectText: Permite que 1 Digimon seu evolua para sua forma X-Antibody.

cards.name: Disco de Recuperação
cards.effectText: Recupera 1 de HP do seu Tamer.
